results.title: Supreme Court will consider striking down assault weapons bans, in Connecticut and the Chicago-area
A Fort Worth Stockyards favorite restaurant is shutting down Sunday
results.description: A 1913 building that was originally a city police station and a Texas Department of Public Safety regional headquarters has been the home of La Playa Maya restaurant’s Stockyards-area location, as seen June 29, 2026.

results.title: Four things to know about South Africa’s anti-migrant protests
results.description: South Africa faces nationwide anti-immigrant marches after hardline citizen-led groups ordered undocumented foreigners to leave the country by Tuesday. The post Four things to know about South Africa’s anti-migrant protests appeared first on Vanguard News .
